name: BB:FalsePositive: Local Source to Remote Destination False Positives
notes: Edit this BB to define all the false positive QIDs that occur to or from Local-to-Remote (L2R) based servers.
bb_references: BB:FalsePositive: Local Source to Remote Destination False Positives on events which are detected by the undefined system
conditions_text: the event QID is one of the following (1007205) SMB:NAME-WILDCARD
where the attack context is Local to Remote
TD_list: APPLY BB:FalsePositive: Local Source to Remote Destination False Positives on events which are detected by the undefined system

AND where the attack context is Local to Remote
